name: ts-node
description: TypeScript execution and REPL for node.js

commits.message: Fix implicit config on old ts versions (#2064)
bump min ts version to 4.4 to match definitelytyped at time of writing (#2063)
Add @tsconfig/node20, add node 20 to test matrix (#2003)
fix: lazy-load repl to avoid domain side effects (#2025)
flatten and break up test suites into multiple files (#2015)
Fix failing tests due to newer @tsconfig/bases (#2011)
installation from git in various package managers: add e2e, fix (#2010)
Rename prepare script to prepack for compat with yarn (#1980)
Update bundled `transpileModule` implementation to match latest TS codebase (#1973)
Fix bug where REPL inputs were compiled as ESM in ESM projects (#1959)
TS 5.0 Supporting Multiple Configuration Files in extends (#1958)
Fix ESM node processes being unable to fork into other scripts (#1814)
try adding config to ignore formatting commits in blame view (#1835)
Make --project accept path to directory containing tsconfig, not just path to tsconfig (#1830)
tweak contributing doc to explain the correct `np` invocation
Revert "Use file URL for source map paths (#1771)" (#1821)
fix missing tag declaration in api-extractor config; update api-extractor report
Use file URL for source map paths (#1771)
Fix #1778: typechecker resolver should take importer's module type -- cjs or esm -- into account when resolving package.json "exports" (#1782)
add @category tag to allowlist in apiextractor config
`getTypeInfo` should normalize slashes in path before querying our internal APIs for type info (#1762)
Implement file extension resolution for CJS, same as ESM; add exhaustive tests for resolver (#1727)
Match ts-node REPL behavior of object literals with Node REPL (#1699)
Use dprint's prettier plugin: identical formatting; faster thanks to incremental caching (#1722)
Add justfile because it is nice using just (#1720)
add short-circuit flag to all ESM hook return values (#1715)
Fix #1667 multiline function arguments support in REPL (#1677)
`ts-node-esm` / `--esm` to spawn a child process; decouple config loading from `create()`; fix pluggable dep resolution (#1655)
lazy-load dependencies to improve responsiveness when they aren't used (#1676)
Allow json modules to be resolved in Node >=17.5.0 without flag (#1665)
update apiextractor report prior to the release of 10.6.0
Fix #1657: bug where node flags were not correctly preserved in `execArgv` (#1658)
Implement #1649: When entrypoint fails to resolve via ESM, fallback to CommonJS resolution (#1654)
